name: Char-Grilled Kangaroo Kebabs and Smoked Eggpl
recipeIngredient: 1 1/3 lb Kangaroo fillet, trimmed and cubed
2 tsp Coriander seeds, roasted and ground
recipeInstructions:
1. Roll the cubes of kangaroo meat in the ground coriander seed and black pepper, coating lightly.
2. Skewer the meat and place on an oiled tray until ready to cook.
3. Grill the eggplants until their skins are black and blistered. Cool slightly and peel them while still warm. Remove the bitter juices.
4. Mash the eggplant flesh with a large fork, gradually adding the garlic, lemon juice, tahini, sea salt, parsley, and yoghurt.
5. Grill the kebabs under (or over) high heat, brushing with oil to keep moist. Be careful not to toughen the meat.
6. Spoon the eggplant puree onto plates. Remove the skewers and place the meat cubes on top of the puree.
7. Serve immediately.
